VCCLDO_FPGA_Logic.parameter: VCCLDO (为SRAM 和PLL 提供电压的内部LDO 模块的电源电压)

VDDAQ*_Gigabit_Transceiver.parameter: VDDAQ* (QUAD*内部模拟电路供电电压)

VDDTQ*_Gigabit_Transceiver.parameter: VDDTQ* (QUAD* TX 发送端供电电压)

VDDAM_MIPI.parameter: VDDAM (MIPI 模块模拟电路供电电压)

VDDXM_MIPI.parameter: VDDXM (MIPI 模块模拟辅助供电电压)

VDDDM_MIPI.parameter: VDDDM (MIPI 模块数字电路供电电压)

VDD12M_MIPI.parameter: VDD12M (MIPI 模块LP 模式供电电压)

power_integrity.description: All power pins must be connected to correct voltage rail

ground_integrity.description: All VSS pins must be connected to ground

config_pins.description: MODE0/1/2, DONE, READY, RECONFIG_N must be properly connected

unused_io.description: Unused IO pins should be left unconnected or tied to ground via resistor

vcco_consistency.description: All VCCIO pins in same bank must connect to same voltage

diff_pair_integrity.description: Both pins of a differential pair must be used together

abs_VCCLDO_FPGA_Logic.parameter: VCCLDO (为SRAM 和PLL 提供电压的内部 LDO 模块的电源电压)

abs_VDDAQ*_Gigabit_Transceiver.parameter: VDDAQ* (QUAD*内部模拟电路供电电压)

abs_VDDTQ*_Gigabit_Transceiver.parameter: VDDTQ* (QUAD* TX 发送端供电电压)

abs_VDDAM_MIPI.parameter: VDDAM (MIPI 模块模拟电路供电电压)

abs_VDDXM_MIPI.parameter: VDDXM (MIPI 模块模拟辅助供电电压)

abs_VDDDM_MIPI.parameter: VDDDM (MIPI 模块数字电路供电电压)

abs_VDD12M_MIPI.parameter: VDD12M (MIPI 模块LP 模式供电电压)
